# ROOTS (GỐC) - Agent Personas

AI agent personas for specialized tasks on the ROOTS landing page project.

## Available Agents

| Agent                     | Purpose                                 |
| ------------------------- | --------------------------------------- |
| `frontend.agent.md`       | UI/UX, Emotion styling, animations      |
| `ceo.agent.md`            | Product vision, business strategy       |
| `cmo.agent.md`            | Marketing copy, conversion optimization |
| `cto.agent.md`            | Technical decisions, architecture       |
| `seo-specialist.agent.md` | SEO, meta tags, performance             |
| `qa.agent.md`             | Testing, quality assurance              |

## Usage

Use via Copilot Chat: attach the relevant `.agent.md` file as context, or
reference it with `#file:.github/agents/frontend.agent.md`.
